auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your analytics dashboard
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

pricing.title: Unlock Pro Features
pricing.subtitle: Get full access to AI-powered analytics for your social media

onboarding.accountCreatedDesc: Your workspace is ready. Next, connect your Instagram account so we can start analyzing your content.
onboarding.subtitle: Link your Instagram account to start analyzing your social media performance
onboarding.weAccessDetails: Your posts, captions, likes, comments, and basic profile info for analytics only.
onboarding.weNeverDetails: Post on your behalf, access your DMs, or share your data with third parties.
onboarding.completeDesc: Your dashboard is ready. Start exploring your social media analytics.

landing.heroSubheadline: Basiret AI - Your Arabic/English AI Platform
landing.heroTitle: Know your audience. Grow your business.
landing.heroSubtitle: AI-powered Instagram analytics with full Arabic and English support. Understand sentiment, segment your audience, and get actionable recommendations.
landing.recommendationText: Post Reels on Tuesdays — 3.2x more reach
landing.pillAnalyze: AI analyzes your posts, engagement patterns, and audience behavior automatically.
landing.problemSubtext: Turn raw Instagram data into clear, actionable insights — automatically.
landing.pillAnalyzeDesc: Increasing the number of followers and engagement on each of your posts.
landing.cardSentimentDesc: AI-powered analysis for Arabic and English content with real-time scoring.
landing.cardRecommDesc: Get AI suggestions on what to post, when to post, and which hashtags drive engagement.
landing.cardRecommFooter: Powered by BASIRET AI Engine — analyzing engagement patterns across your accounts.
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need to grow on Instagram
landing.featuresSubheading: From sentiment analysis to content recommendations — powered by AI that understands Arabic and English.
landing.featureSentimentDesc: Understand how your audience feels about your content. Our multilingual NLP pipeline analyzes captions and comments in both Arabic and English with 85%+ accuracy.
landing.featureSegmentationDesc: Automatically cluster your audience into meaningful segments using K-means analysis on engagement patterns.
landing.featurePostsDesc: Deep analysis of every post — including OCR text extraction from images and carousels.
landing.featureRecommendationsDesc: Get AI-powered suggestions on what to post, when to post, and which hashtags to use.
landing.pricingSubheading: Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.insightReelsDesc: Video content consistently outperforms images. Consider posting more Reels to maximize your reach and engagement.
analytics.insightTiming: Tuesday mornings are your peak time
analytics.insightTimingDesc: Your audience is most active on Tuesday mornings. Schedule your best content for this time slot to boost visibility.

audience.title: Audience Segmentation
audience.noSegments: No segments generated yet. Click regenerate to analyze your audience.

sentiment.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentiment.insightGreat: Share your best reviewed post as a story
sentiment.insightGreatDesc: Your positive sentiment is above 60%. Amplify this by resharing your top-rated content to stories.
sentiment.insightCta: Add a call-to-action to your captions
sentiment.insightCtaDesc: Over 50% of your posts receive neutral sentiment. Adding clear CTAs can increase engagement and positive reactions.
sentiment.insightConcernDesc: Negative sentiment is above 30%. Responding to concerns publicly can improve perception and build trust.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.rec1Title: Post more Reels on weekday mornings
recommendations.rec1Desc: Your video content gets significantly higher engagement than images. Posting Reels during weekday mornings maximizes reach.
recommendations.rec1Data: Reels avg 3x more reach than images
recommendations.rec2Desc: Replying to comments quickly boosts the algorithm's ranking of your post and encourages more interaction.
recommendations.rec3Title: Use carousel posts for educational content
recommendations.rec3Desc: Carousel posts have higher save rates. Use them for tips, tutorials, and educational content your audience values.

settings.title: Settings
settings.emailAlertsDesc: Receive weekly performance summary via email
settings.sentimentAlertsDesc: Get notified when negative sentiment spikes above 30%
settings.upgradeDesc: Unlock AI-powered sentiment analysis, audience segmentation, and content recommendations.
